name: good morning
description: gm is a culture token launched on the Solana blockchain, built around one simple but powerful idea: starting every day with positivity. We are bringing people together by spreading good energy, optimism, and a shared sense of community rooted in gm culture. More than a token, gm represents a daily ritual, a mindset, and a movement driven by the people. gm is the people’s culture token. Wake up and gm.
